creator: grog@lemis.com
text:
It is not possible to build print/jadetex without the package
	amssymb.sty:

	tex -ini "&latex" jadetex.ini
	This is TeX, Version 3.14159 (Web2c 7.1) (INITEX)
	(jadetex.ini
	LaTeX2e <1997/12/01> patch level 1
	(jadetex.ltx (/usr/local/share/texmf/tex/latex/minimal.cls
	Document Class: minimal 1996/05/20 Standard LaTeX minimal class
	)
	
	! LaTeX Error: File `amssymb.sty' not found.
	
	Type X to quit or <RETURN> to proceed,
	or enter new name. (Default extension: sty)
	
	Enter file name: ^C
	You have new mail in /var/mail/grog
	
	! Emergency stop.
	<read *> 
	         
	l.15 \RequirePackage{amssymb}[1995/01/01]

Fix: 

Not investigated
How-To-Repeat: 
	# cd /usr/ports/print/jadetex
	# make install
